mapper.select: /** UsptTaskPartcptsHistDao.selectList */ select task_partcpts_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_task_partcpts_hist_id ,partcpts_nm ,chrg_realm_nm ,enc_mbtlnum ,enc_brthdy ,partcptn_rate ,member_id ,(select cm.member_nm from cmmt_member cm where cm.member_id = utph.member_id ) as member_nm /*업체명*/ from uspt_task_partcpts_hist utph where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and created_dt = ( select max(created_dt) from uspt_task_partcpts_hist sutph where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and (confm_task_partcpts_hist_id is null or confm_task_partcpts_hist_id = ''))

/** UsptTaskPartcptsHistDao.selectUsptTaskPartcptsHistChangeDe */ select cnvn_change_req_id , to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmdd') as change_de , to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmddhh24miss') as change_dt from uspt_task_partcpts_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_task_partcpts_hist_id is null or confm_task_partcpts_hist_id ='') /*변경전정보는 제외*/ group by cnvn_change_req_id, created_dt order by created_dt desc

/** UsptTaskPartcptsHistDao.selectUsptTaskPartcptsHistByDt */ select 'before' as change_be_af ,task_partcpts_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_task_partcpts_hist_id ,partcpts_nm ,chrg_realm_nm ,enc_mbtlnum ,enc_brthdy ,partcptn_rate ,member_id ,(select cm.member_nm from cmmt_member cm where cm.member_id = utph.member_id ) as member_nm /*업체명*/ ,to_char(created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as change_de from uspt_task_partcpts_hist utph where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and confm_task_partcpts_hist_id is not null and confm_task_partcpts_hist_id !='' union all select 'after' as change_be_af ,task_partcpts_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_task_partcpts_hist_id ,partcpts_nm ,chrg_realm_nm ,enc_mbtlnum ,enc_brthdy ,partcptn_rate ,member_id ,(select cm.member_nm from cmmt_member cm where cm.member_id = utph.member_id ) as member_nm /*업체명*/ ,to_char(created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as change_de from uspt_task_partcpts_hist utph where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_task_partcpts_hist_id is null or confm_task_partcpts_hist_id = '') and to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmddhh24miss') = #{changeDt}
